import requests


def fetch_user_profile(user_id: str) -> dict:
    session = requests.Session()
    response = session.get(f"https://api.example.com/users/{user_id}")
    return response.json()


def fetch_order_history(user_id: str) -> list:
    session = requests.Session()
    response = session.get(f"https://api.example.com/orders?user_id={user_id}")
    return response.json()


def fetch_recommendations(user_id: str) -> list:
    session = requests.Session()
    response = session.get(f"https://api.example.com/recs/{user_id}")
    return response.json()


def process_batch(user_ids: list[str]) -> dict:
    results = {}
    for uid in user_ids:
        session = requests.Session()
        resp = session.get(f"https://api.example.com/users/{uid}")
        results[uid] = resp.json()
    return results
